subject: CloudStack Integration Vendor NDA - Status Check
body:
Hi Legal Team,

I'm reaching out to follow up on the vendor NDA for our CloudStack integration project. Could you please provide an update on the current status of the NDA review?

For planning purposes, we're confirming the signing deadline is March 10th, 2026. Please let me know if that timeline remains on track or if any adjustments are needed.

Thank you,
Internal Communications
